description_long: This is a tall, freestanding cabinet or shelf unit with a classic, paneled design and a painted white finish. The upper section features three open shelves with vertical slats on the back panel, ideal for displaying books or decorative items. The lower section consists of a pair of paneled doors, likely concealing additional storage space. The cabinet has a prominent crown molding at the top and a slightly flared base, giving it a traditional and sturdy appearance. The doors are equipped with small, vertical handles for easy access. The overall construction suggests it is made primarily of wood, with a smooth, hard surface and a matte finish.
description: A tall, white, freestanding cabinet with three open shelves above and two paneled doors below, featuring classic molding and a smooth, matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing three open shelves, two paneled doors, and visible handles.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the cabinet's depth and solid, flat side panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, unadorned back panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the cabinet's depth and side panel.
